signals.name: Nifty 50
signals.expect: Traditional bias favours UPSIDE — prefer buying dips inside favourable horas; trail stops.
signals.reason: Wednesday (ruler Mercury). Moon in Cancer · Pushya (lord Saturn). Tritiya, Shukla (waxing). Mercury strong in Gemini; Jupiter strong in Cancer.
signals.social:
🪐 Nifty 50 — VedicAstro (traditional view)
Reading: Bullish lean.
Wednesday (ruler Mercury). Moon in Cancer · Pushya (lord Saturn). Tritiya, Shukla (waxing). Mercury strong in Gemini; Jupiter strong in Cancer.
🕐 Favourable entry windows (IST): 09:00–10:00, 13:00–14:00, 14:00–15:00
⛔ Avoid (Rahu Kaal): 12:00–13:30 IST (Rahu Kaal)
📅 Traditionally favoured days ahead: 2026-06-18, 2026-06-19, 2026-06-22
